should_trigger: Here are the notes from yesterday's customer call — what should I do with them?
I just got a Slack thread from sales asking about feature X. Help me triage this.
Process this Jira ticket into a requirement.
I have raw notes from the offsite — turn them into something structured.
An exec just pinged me with an ad-hoc ask. Capture it.
Convert this messy meeting note into an action card.
Help me figure out what to do with this dump of customer quotes.
should_not_trigger: Write a PRD for the new pricing feature.
Summarize the roadmap for the leadership team.
Run a retrospective on last quarter.
Update the wiki page for Product Y.
Draft a decision record for the auth migration.
Lint the wiki for stale pages.
